ooi.name: Fangbeast
ooi.description: A terrifying forgotten_beast of immense power

items.memory: In the beginning, was driven from its territory by a greater predator, coming to this land This was the start of its story. The Boneking was a constant rival — our territories clashed.  The land churned with disorder and upheaval.
items.reflection: The beast is a force of nature — untamed and unbroken.

items.memory: Looking back at the 51s (The Frost Era, year 52), it stands out — the nights were long. What marked that decade was I attacked Trograkgrik-mound, killing 22. The most poignant moment was I attacked Rikspigklik-hollow, killing 15. The shadows of that time linger still. The Fangbeast terrorized the region.  The world was wild and unpredictable.
items.reflection: There is a primal intelligence in the beast's eyes.

items.memory: In the 66s (Age of Ashen, year 5), the forgotten_beast felt heavy with change. During this time, the beast grew in size and power, becoming a greater threat over time It was a decade that tested the forgotten_beast. The settlement of Winconram-bridge was a hated foe.  Turbulence marked every season.
items.reflection: The beast does not hate — it simply exists.

items.memory: In the 82s (Age of Ashen, year 21), the forgotten_beast felt alive with possibility. During this time, the beast was tracked by a band of adventurers who sought to slay it It was a decade that shaped the forgotten_beast.  Chaos reigned — nothing was certain.
items.reflection: The beast is a reminder that the wild still endures.

items.memory: Looking back at the 97s (Age of Ashen, year 36), it stands out — the nights were long. During this time, the beast claimed a territory and defended it against all intruders The shadows of that time linger still. The Doomdrake was a constant rival — our territories clashed. The settlement of Winconram-bridge was a hated foe.  Madness and flux were the rulers of those days.
items.reflection: The beast's presence shapes the land around it.

items.memory: In the 113s (Age of Ashen, year 52), the forgotten_beast felt sharp and dangerous. During this time, the beast was encountered by a traveling merchant who barely escaped That decade taught the wilds that the world is cruel. The settlement of Winconram-bridge was a hated foe.  The old certainties burned away in the fire of change.
items.reflection: The beast is a force of nature — untamed and unbroken.

items.memory: The 128s (The Golden Times, year 5) was a prosperous decade for this forgotten_beast. During this time, the beast was rumored to possess supernatural qualities The shadows of that time linger still. The Fangbeast terrorized the region. The Doomdrake was a constant rival — our territories clashed.  Nothing was safe — the very earth seemed to shift.
items.reflection: The beast does not hate — it simply exists.

items.memory: Looking back at the 144s (The Golden Times, year 21), it stands out — the air smelled of smoke. What marked that decade was I attacked Bertaldolf-burg, killing 56. What marked that decade was I attacked Gakskigglibwarren, killing 57. It was a decade that shaped the forgotten_beast.  Anarchy and change were the only constants.
items.reflection: The beast remembers the ancient ways of the wild.

items.memory: In the 159s (The Golden Times, year 36), the forgotten_beast felt alive with possibility. During this time, the beast was driven into a new region by a natural disaster It was a decade that marked the forgotten_beast.  The old certainties burned away in the fire of change.
items.reflection: The beast remembers the ancient ways of the wild.

items.memory: Looking back at the 175s (The Golden Times, year 52), it stands out — the nights were long. During this time, the beast's lair was discovered — filled with the remains of its victims It was a decade that shaped the forgotten_beast. The settlement of Kazadkulzolgate was a hated foe.  Nothing was safe — the very earth seemed to shift.
items.reflection: The beast does not hate — it simply exists.

items.memory: Looking back at the 190s (The Pearl Years, year 5), it stands out — everything felt fragile. During this time, the beast's roars were heard for miles, marking its dominance The shadows of that time linger still.  Chaos reigned — nothing was certain.
items.reflection: The beast does not hate — it simply exists.

items.memory: The 206s (The Pearl Years, year 21) was a dark decade for this forgotten_beast. During this time, the beast was wounded in a battle with hunters and retreated to its lair The shadows of that time linger still. The settlement of Kazadkulzolgate was a hated foe.  Anarchy and change were the only constants.
items.reflection: The beast is part of the world's raw power — dangerous and beautiful.

items.memory: Looking back at the 221s (The Pearl Years, year 36), it stands out — the air smelled of smoke. The defining event was I attacked Durorn-deep, killing 82. The defining event was I attacked Bertulframbridge, killing 79. It was a decade that tested the forgotten_beast. The Fangbeast terrorized the region. The Doomdrake was a constant rival — our territories clashed.  The old certainties burned away in the fire of change.
items.reflection: The beast is part of the world's raw power — dangerous and beautiful.

items.memory: In the 237s (The Pearl Years, year 52), the forgotten_beast felt worn and tired. The most poignant moment was I attacked Balbazgate, killing 88. What marked that decade was I attacked Mundaldbert-ford, killing 93. That decade taught the wilds that the world is cruel. The settlement of Winconram-bridge was a hated foe.  Turbulence marked every season.
items.reflection: The beast is a force of nature — untamed and unbroken.

items.memory: Signs of bandits were noted near the forgotten_beast.
A stranger arrived carrying news from distant lands — the forgotten_beast drew their gaze.
A master made a proclamation about the forgotten_beast.
A nearby field was damaged.
The weather this season was unusual — it affected the forgotten_beast.
Supplies for tending the forgotten_beast were found lacking.
The forgotten_beast was examined this season.
The land around the forgotten_beast changed with the seasons — golden and alive.
Considering the wilds. I wonder what the coming year will bring to the forgotten_beast.
This season last year was better — the forgotten_beast has suffered since then.
The future is uncertain. This season feels fleeting — the forgotten_beast fights it.
The elders say that this season is sacred.
The future is uncertain. The forgotten_beast has been working more than usual this season.
Considering the wilds. This spring, the forgotten_beast feels forgotten.
The spring cold hangs over the wilds — it makes the forgotten_beast feel fragile.
I will expand my territory — the land will be mine.
I will climb the peak and survey my domain — from there all is visible.
I will teach the young ones to stalk and kill — they must learn.
I will mark my scent across the ridge — the pack will know my range.
I will delve deeper into the caves — there is something ancient there.
I will grow stronger — the wild will make me fiercer.
I worry about the sickness among the herd — the meat is thin.
I worry about Kazadkulzolgate — they send hunters after us.
I worry about the strange scents on the wind — something new is coming.
I worry about the hunters — they track me with iron and fire.
